task_description: Read train.json and test.json using pandas or python's json module, train a classifier to predict whether a reddit request will receive a pizza (the label is 'requester_received_pizza'). Output predicted probabilities for the test set to 'results.csv' in the output folder. The model is evaluated using the Area under the ROC curve (AUC-ROC) metric. Please print explicit checkpoint statements at each phase (e.g., 'Starting preprocessing...', 'Training model...', 'Evaluating model...', 'Generating predictions...', 'Saving results...', 'Validation checks passed!').
data_prompt:
The dataset files are located at /tmp/mlebench-lite/random-acts-of-pizza/prepared. The files are train.json, test.json, and sampleSubmission.csv. The label column is 'requester_received_pizza' (boolean/binary). Predict the probabilities on the test set and output predictions matching sample submission column formats:
request_id,requester_received_pizza
t3_1aw5zf,0.15
t3_roiuw,0.0
...
user_input: Train a classifier model on the random acts of pizza dataset using scikit-learn and print explicit checkpoints.
tool_prompt: Use pandas and scikit-learn to make baseline predictions with clear print checkpoints.
